title: lasianthera umbellata
intro: Lasianthera umbellata, also known as the bushy wild jasmine or bushy jasmine, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, helping to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Lasianthera umbellata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lasianthera umbellata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
